## Bowties Prior-Work Discovery (do this as part of initial research)

Before beginning the analysis, search open GitHub issues labeled `kind/idea` filtered by the feature's `area/*` labels (`gh issue list --repo JohnSL/Bowties --label kind/idea --state open`) for prior analysis, deferred decisions, or superseded approaches so the analysis accounts for prior work and avoids recommending already-rejected approaches. Also glance at any residual `specs/ideas/**` files until migration completes.
